exploration_notes: The Inductor ReLU/GELU(Addmm) fusion was introduced across two main commits: (1) commit 096c935 '[CUDA][cuBLASLt] addmm -- enable 2D bias in the Lt path when followed by an activation (#165548)' which modified Blas.cpp and CUDABlas.cpp to add cuBLASLt epilogue support for 2D bias with activation fusions, and (2) commit 8982850 '[Inductor] ReLU/GELU(Addmm) fusions (#168157)' which added the pattern matcher registrations in post_grad.py. The 4 files to modify are: (1) torch/_inductor/fx_passes/pos
